---
title: "H3K27ac_DGE"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	dev = c("png","pdf")
)

# ---- AUTO-SAVE PNG + PDF FOR EVERY PLOT ----
knitr::knit_hooks$set(plot = function(x, options) {
  outdir <- "docs"
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Base filename (chunk label or auto-generated)
  name <- options$label
  if (is.null(name) || name == "") {
    name <- paste0("plot-", knitr::opts_current$get("chunk.id"))
  }

  # Save PNG
  pngfile <- file.path(outdir, paste0(name, ".png"))
  grDevices::png(pngfile, width = 800, height = 600, res = 120)
  print(x)
  grDevices::dev.off()

  # Save PDF
  pdffile <- file.path(outdir, paste0(name, ".pdf"))
  grDevices::pdf(pdffile, width = 7, height = 5)
  print(x)
  grDevices::dev.off()

  # Return plot to appear in the knitted document
  knitr::hook_plot_md(x, options)
})
```

```{r Setting the Enviroment}

#loading libraries
library("tidyverse")
library("readxl")
library("readr")
library("ggrepel")
library("ggfortify")
library("patchwork")
library("eulerr")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("ggVennDiagram")
library("ggrastr")
library("edgeR")
library("limma")
library("ggsignif")
library("dplyr")
library("purrr")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyr")
# BiocManager::install("VennDiagram")



#Loading objects used in this workbook
H3K27ac_Metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_Metadata.RDS")
ann_colors <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/ann_colors.RDS")
H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
```

```{r Volcano_Plot_Function,Result="Hide",warning=FALSE, include = FALSE}
generate_volcano_plot <- function(toptable, title) {
  
  # #check for entrezid 
  # if(!"Entrez_ID" %in% colnames(toptable)) stop("Entrez_ID col not present")
  # 
  #make significance labels
  
  toptable <- toptable %>% 
    mutate(Significance = case_when(
      logFC > 0 & adj.P.Val < 0.05 ~ "Upregulated",
      logFC < 0 & adj.P.Val < 0.05 ~ "Downregulated",
      TRUE  ~ "Not Significant"
    ))
  
  #factor significance
  toptable$Significance <- factor(
    toptable$Significance, 
    levels = c("Upregulated", 
               "Not Significant", 
               "Downregulated")
  )
  
  #count genes in each category
  upgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Upregulated")
  nsgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Not Significant")
  downgenes <- sum(toptable$Significance == "Downregulated")
  
  
  #labels for legend
  legend_lab <- c(
    paste0("Upregulated: ", upgenes),
    paste0("Not Significant: ", nsgenes),
    paste0("Downregulated: ", downgenes)
  )
  
  #colors 
  color_map <- c("Upregulated" = "blue",
                 "Not Significant" = "grey30",
                 "Downregulated" = "red")
  
  #generate volcano plots
  p <- ggplot(toptable, aes(x = logFC, 
                            y = -log10(P.Value),
                            color = Significance)) +
    geom_point_rast(alpha = 0.8, size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_map, 
                       labels = legend_lab,
                       breaks = c("Upregulated",
                                  "Not Significant", 
                                  "Downregulated"))  +
    xlim(-20,20) +
    labs(title = title, 
         x = expression("log"[2]*"FC"),
         y = expression("-log"[10]*"p-value")) +
    # theme_custom() +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  return(p)
}


```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_Species_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_species <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day4","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Species DERs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-5, 5)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_Species_sig_No4, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_species_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {
  
  comparison_colors <- c(
  HvC_Day0  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day0"]),
  HvC_Day2  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day2"]),
  HvC_Day5  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day5"]),
  HvC_Day15 = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day15"]),
  HvC_Day30 = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day30"])
)

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

 p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = comparison_colors) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab(" ") +
  ylab("logFC") +
  ggtitle(
    paste0(
      cluster_name,
      " Species DERs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
      signif(kw$p.value, 3)
    )
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-5, 5)) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r absFC_Plot_Function_Species_sig_No4, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_absfc_sig_species_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {
  
  comparison_colors <- c(
  HvC_Day0  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day0"]),
  HvC_Day2  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day2"]),
  HvC_Day5  = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day5"]),
  HvC_Day15 = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day15"]),
  HvC_Day30 = unname(ann_colors$timepoint_cor["Day30"])
)

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

 p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = absfc)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = comparison_colors) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab(" ") +
  ylab("absfc") +
  ggtitle(
    paste0(
      cluster_name,
      " Species DERs absfc Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
      signif(kw$p.value, 3)
    )
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,5)) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_Species_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_absfc_sig_species <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day4","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$absfc,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = absfc)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("absfc") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Species DERs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}
```

```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_sig_No4, include = FALSE}
plot_cluster_absfc_sig_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")
  
  # Global test across comparisons
  kw <- kruskal.test(AbsFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)
  
  pw_kw <-pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$AbsFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH")
  
  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = AbsFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("AbslogFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " H3K27ac AbsFC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)


}
```


```{r AbsFC_Plot_Function_Trajectory_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_absfc_sig_trajectory_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$absfc,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = absfc)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Trajectory DEGs FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}
```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_Trajectory_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Trajectroy DEG FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-5, 5)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r FC_Plot_Function_Interaction_sig, include = FALSE}

plot_cluster_fc_sig_interaction_No4 <- function(gene_vector, cluster_name, top_table) {

  df <- top_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_vector) %>%
    mutate(Comparisons = factor(Comparisons, levels = c(
      "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530","C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
    )))

  cat(cluster_name, ":", nrow(df), "rows,",
      length(unique(df$Gene)), "unique genes\n")

  # ✅ Skip if no data
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    message(cluster_name, ": no data — skipping")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ✅ Skip if only one comparison present
  if (length(unique(df$Comparisons)) < 2) {
    message(cluster_name, ": only one comparison — skipping stats")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Stats
  kw <- kruskal.test(logFC ~ Comparisons, data = df)

  pw_kw <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    df$logFC,
    df$Comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )

  print(pw_kw)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Comparisons, y = logFC)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Comparisons)) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab(" ") +
    ylab("logFC") +
    ggtitle(
      paste0(
        cluster_name,
        " Trajectroy DEG FC Comparisons\nKruskal–Wallis p = ",
        signif(kw$p.value, 3)
      )
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-5, 5)) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.3), hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 15)
    )

  return(p)
}

```

```{r get_directional_genes, include = FALSE}

get_fc_directions <- function(traj_label, coef_name, comparison_label,
                              top_table_all, fit_obj, p_cutoff = 0.05, gene_set = NULL) {

  # ---------------------------
  # trajectory FC data
  # ---------------------------
  df_fc <- top_table_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      Comparisons %in% c(
        paste0("H_", comparison_label),
        paste0("C_", comparison_label)
      )
    )

  df_dir <- df_fc %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Species = ifelse(grepl("^H_", Comparisons), "H", "C")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Gene, Species) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(logFC = mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Species, values_from = logFC) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(H), !is.na(C)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  # ---------------------------
  # KEY FILTER: DEGs in BOTH species
  # ---------------------------
  if (!is.null(gene_set)) {
    df_dir <- df_dir %>%
      dplyr::filter(Gene %in% gene_set)
  }

  # ---------------------------
  # direction classification
  # ---------------------------
  df_combo <- df_dir %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      direction = dplyr::case_when(
        H > 0 & C < 0 ~ "H_pos_C_neg",
        H < 0 & C > 0 ~ "H_neg_C_pos",
        H > 0 & C > 0 ~ "Both_pos",
        H < 0 & C < 0 ~ "Both_neg",
        TRUE ~ "Other"
      ),
      direction_group = dplyr::case_when(
        H * C > 0 ~ "Same_direction",
        H * C < 0 ~ "Opposite_direction",
        TRUE ~ "Other"
      )
    )

  # ---------------------------
  # output
  # ---------------------------
  list(
    all = df_combo,
    H_pos_C_neg = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "H_pos_C_neg"),
    H_neg_C_pos = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "H_neg_C_pos"),
    Both_pos = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Both_pos"),
    Both_neg = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Both_neg"),

    Same_direction = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction_group == "Same_direction"),
    Opposite_direction = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction_group == "Opposite_direction"),

    Other = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Other"),

    n_sig = length(gene_set)
  )
}
```

```{r get_directional_genes_HvC, include = FALSE}

get_fc_directions_HvC <- function(traj_label, coef_name, comparison_label,
                                 top_table_all, fit_obj, p_cutoff = 0.05) {

  # ---------------------------
  # DE genes
  # ---------------------------
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = coef_name, number = Inf)

  sig_tt <- tt %>%
    dplyr::filter(adj.P.Val < p_cutoff) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  # ---------------------------
  # HvC FC data
  # ---------------------------
  df_fc <- top_table_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(Comparisons == comparison_label) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(Gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

  # ---------------------------
  # classify direction
  # ---------------------------
  df_combo <- df_fc %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(sig_tt, by = "Gene") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    direction = dplyr::case_when(
      logFC.x > 0 ~ "Human_higher",
      logFC.x < 0 ~ "Chimp_higher",
      TRUE ~ "No_difference"
    ),
    magnitude = abs(logFC.x)
  )

  # ---------------------------
  # output
  # ---------------------------
  list(
    all = df_combo,
    Human_higher = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Human_higher"),
    Chimp_higher = dplyr::filter(df_combo, direction == "Chimp_higher"),
    n_sig = nrow(sig_tt)
  )
}
```

```{r go_enrichment}
Enrich_Go_sets <- function(gene_sets, v) {

  library(clusterProfiler)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
  library(dplyr)

  # -----------------------------
  # Universe (FIXED)
  # -----------------------------
  background_genes <- rownames(v$E) %>%
    sub("\\..*", "", .)

  # -----------------------------
  # GO helper
  # -----------------------------
  run_go <- function(genes) {

    genes <- unique(sub("\\..*", "", genes))

    if (length(genes) < 10) return(NULL)

    ego <- enrichGO(
      gene          = genes,
      universe      = background_genes,
      OrgDb         = org.Hs.eg.db,
      keyType       = "ENSEMBL",
      ont           = "BP",
      readable      = TRUE
    )

    if (is.null(ego)) return(NULL)

    as.data.frame(ego)
  }

  # -----------------------------
  # Run for each gene set
  # -----------------------------
  results <- lapply(gene_sets, function(df) {
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
    run_go(df$Gene)
  })

  return(results)
}
```

###Reproducible2

####Not CPM Filtered
#####Stats

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Stats_Reproducible2, fig.height=7,fig.width=7}
library(edgeR)

counts_table <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_Metadata.RDS")

counts <- counts_table %>%
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day0")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40280_Day2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))

metadata <- metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint != "Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day5") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day30")

counts_norep <- counts %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

saveRDS(counts_norep,"data/DGE/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut.RDS")

#create DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_norep)
dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$Cond)

dim(dge)
dge$samples

metadata$Species <- factor(
  metadata$Species,
  levels = c("C", "H")   # Chimp baseline
)

 metadata$Timepoint <- factor(
   metadata$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)

design_int <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data =  metadata)

colnames(design_int)
colnames(design_int) <- make.names(colnames(design_int))

library(edgeR)

logCPM <- cpm(dge, log = TRUE, prior.count = 2)

summary(rowMeans(logCPM))

hist(
    rowMeans(logCPM),
    breaks = 100,
    main = "Mean log2CPM across peaks - Reproducible2",
    xlab = "Mean log2CPM"
)

cpm_mat <- cpm(dge)

support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 1)

summary(support)

table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold - Reproducible 2",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 1"
)


support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 2)

summary(support)

table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold - Reproducible 2",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 2"
)


data.frame(
    Filter = c(
        "All",
        "Mean CPM > 1",
        "Mean CPM > 2",
        "Mean CPM > 5"
    ),
    Peaks = c(
        nrow(cpm_mat),
        sum(rowMeans(cpm_mat) > 1),
        sum(rowMeans(cpm_mat) > 2),
        sum(rowMeans(cpm_mat) > 5)
    )
)
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Stats_Reproducible2_FitleringGlobal, fig.height=7,fig.width=7}
library(edgeR)

counts_table <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_Metadata.RDS")

counts <- counts_table %>%
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day0")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40280_Day2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))

metadata <- metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint != "Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day5") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day30")

counts_norep <- counts %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

saveRDS(counts_norep,"data/DGE/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut.RDS")


#create DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_norep)
dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$Cond)

dim(dge)
dge$samples

metadata$Species <- factor(
  metadata$Species,
  levels = c("C", "H")   # Chimp baseline
)

 metadata$Timepoint <- factor(
   metadata$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)

design_int <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data =  metadata)

colnames(design_int)
colnames(design_int) <- make.names(colnames(design_int))

library(edgeR)

logCPM <- cpm(dge, log = TRUE, prior.count = 2)

summary(rowMeans(logCPM))

hist(
    rowMeans(logCPM),
    breaks = 100,
    main = "Mean log2CPM across peaks \n Reproducible2",
    xlab = "Mean log2CPM"
)

cpm_mat <- cpm(dge)

support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 1)

summary(support)

table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold  \n Reproducible2",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 1"
)


support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 2)

summary(support)

table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold  \n Reproducible2",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 2"
)

cpm_mat <- cpm(dge)

## Global filter
keep_all <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 2) >= 4

counts_filt_byAll <- H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc[keep_all, ]

cat("Original:", nrow(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc), "\n")
cat("Global filter:", nrow(counts_filt_byAll), "\n")



counts_table <- counts_filt_byAll
metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_Metadata.RDS")

counts <- counts_table %>%
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day0")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40280_Day2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))

metadata <- metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint != "Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day5") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day30")

counts_norep <- counts %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

saveRDS(counts_norep,"data/DGE/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut_GlobalFilter.RDS")

#create DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_norep)
dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$Cond)

logCPM <- cpm(dge, log = TRUE, prior.count = 2)

summary(rowMeans(logCPM))

hist(
    rowMeans(logCPM),
    breaks = 100,
    main = "Mean log2CPM across peaks \n Reproducible2 \n Global Filter - CPM>2 in >4",
    xlab = "Mean log2CPM"
)

cpm_mat <- cpm(dge)

support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 1)

summary(support)

table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold  \n Reproducible2 \n Global Filter - CPM>2 in >4",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 1"
)


support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 2)

summary(support)

table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold  \n Reproducible2 \n Global Filter - CPM>2 in >4",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 2"
)
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Stats_Reproducible2_FitleringCondition, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
library(edgeR)

counts_table <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_Metadata.RDS")

counts <- counts_table %>%
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day0")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40280_Day2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))

metadata <- metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint != "Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day5") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day30")

counts_norep <- counts %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))

saveRDS(counts_norep,"data/DGE/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut.RDS")


#create DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_norep)
dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$Cond)

dim(dge)
dge$samples

metadata$Species <- factor(
  metadata$Species,
  levels = c("C", "H")   # Chimp baseline
)

 metadata$Timepoint <- factor(
   metadata$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)

design_int <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data =  metadata)

colnames(design_int)
colnames(design_int) <- make.names(colnames(design_int))

library(edgeR)

logCPM <- cpm(dge, log = TRUE, prior.count = 2)

summary(rowMeans(logCPM))

hist(
    rowMeans(logCPM),
    breaks = 100,
    main = "Mean log2CPM across peaks \n Reproducible2",
    xlab = "Mean log2CPM"
)

cpm_mat <- cpm(dge)

support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 1)

summary(support)

table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold  \n Reproducible2",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 1"
)

support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 2)

# summary(support)
# 
# table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold  \n Reproducible2",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 2"
)

## Condition-wise filter
conds <- unique(metadata$Cond)

support_by_cond <- sapply(conds, function(cond) {

    cols <- metadata$Cond == cond

    rowSums(cpm_mat[, cols] > 2)})

keep_cond <- apply(support_by_cond >= 4, 1, any)

counts_filt_bycondition <- counts_norep[keep_cond, ]

cat("Condition filter:", nrow(counts_filt_bycondition), "\n")


#create DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_filt_bycondition)
dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$Cond)

logCPM <- cpm(dge, log = TRUE, prior.count = 2)

summary(rowMeans(logCPM))

hist(
    rowMeans(logCPM),
    breaks = 100,
    main = "Mean log2CPM across peaks \n Reproducible2 \n Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
    xlab = "Mean log2CPM"
)

cpm_mat <- cpm(dge)

support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 1)

# summary(support)
# 
# table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold  \n Reproducible2 \n Condition Filter - CPM>1 in >4",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 1"
)


support <- rowSums(cpm_mat > 2)

summary(support)

table(support)

quantile(
    rowMeans(cpm_mat),
    probs = c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 0.95, 0.99, 1)
)

hist(
    support,
    breaks = 65,
    main = "Peak reproducibility after CPM threshold  \n Reproducible2 \n Condition Filter - CPM>2 in >4",
    xlab = "Number of samples with CPM > 2"
)



```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Differential_Data_Reproducible2}
counts_table <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_Metadata.RDS")

counts <-  counts_table %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <-  metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")

metadata <- metadata %>% 
  filter(!grepl("R", Individual))

metadata$dgelist <- c(rep(c("Human_Day0","Human_Day2","Human_Day5","Human_Day15","Human_Day30"),7),rep(c("Chimp_Day0","Chimp_Day2","Chimp_Day5","Chimp_Day15","Chimp_Day30"),7))

metadata <- metadata%>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

counts_norep <- counts %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))


# #create DGEList object
# dge <- DGEList(counts = counts_norep)
# dge$samples$group <- factor(metadata$dgelist)
# dge <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")

dge <- readRDS("data/DGE/dge_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

dge$samples

dim(dge)
dge$samples

metadata$Species <- factor(
  metadata$Species,
  levels = c("C", "H")   # Chimp baseline
)

 metadata$Timepoint <- factor(
   metadata$Timepoint,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)

design_int <- model.matrix(~ Species * Timepoint,
                           data =  metadata)

colnames(design_int)
colnames(design_int) <- make.names(colnames(design_int))

# # Step 1: voom first
# v1 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE)
# 
# v1 <- readRDS("data/DGE/v1_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
# 
# # Step 2: estimate duplicate correlation on voom-transformed data
# corfit <- duplicateCorrelation(v1, design_int, block = metadata$Individual)
# corfit.correlation <- corfit$consensus.correlation
# 
# # Step 3: voom again including correlation
# v2 <- voom(dge, design_int, plot = TRUE,
#            block = metadata$Individual,
#            correlation = corfit.correlation)
# 
# # Step 4: fit linear model
# fit <- lmFit(v2, design_int, block = metadata$Individual, correlation = corfit.correlation)
# fit <- eBayes(fit)

v2 <- readRDS("data/DGE/v2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
fit <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(metadata$Timepoint)))
day <- metadata$Timepoint
plotDensities(v2, col = pal[as.numeric(day)], legend = FALSE)

human_idx <- metadata$Species == "H"
chimp_idx <- metadata$Species == "C"

pal <- rainbow(length(unique(metadata$Timepoint)))

# Human
plotDensities(
  v2[, human_idx],
  col = pal[as.numeric(as.factor(metadata$Timepoint[human_idx]))],
  main = "",
  legend = FALSE,
  axes = FALSE
)

axis(1)
axis(2)
mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

title("Human")
  legend(
      "right",
      legend = metadata$Individual[human_idx],  # or Timepoint, etc.
      col = rainbow(sum(human_idx)),
      lty = 1,
     cex = 0.7
    )

# Chimp
plotDensities(
  v2[, chimp_idx],
  col = pal[as.numeric(as.factor(metadata$Timepoint[human_idx]))],
  main = "",
  legend = FALSE,
  axes = FALSE
)

axis(1)
axis(2)
mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

title("Chimp")
  legend(
      "right",
      legend = metadata$Individual[chimp_idx],  # or Timepoint, etc.
      col = rainbow(sum(chimp_idx)),
      lty = 1,
     cex = 0.7
    )

species_levels <- unique(metadata$Species)
day_levels <- unique(metadata$Timepoint)

for (sp in species_levels) {
  for (day in day_levels) {

    idx <- metadata$Species == sp &
           metadata$Timepoint == day

    if (sum(idx) > 0) {

      cols <- rainbow(sum(idx))

      plotDensities(
        v2[, idx],
        col = cols,
        main = paste(sp, day),
        legend = FALSE,
        axes = FALSE
      )

      axis(1)
      axis(2)
      mtext("log2 CPM", side = 1, line = 2)

      legend(
        "right",
        legend = metadata$Individual[idx],
        col = cols,
        lty = 1,
        cex = 0.7
      )
    }
  }
}

# saveRDS(dge, "data/DGE/dge_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(design_int, "data/DGE/design_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(v1,"data/DGE/v1_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(v2,"data/DGE/v2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
# saveRDS(fit, "data/DGE/fit_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Differential_Data_Model_Reproducible2}
dge <- readRDS("data/DGE/dge_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
design_int <- readRDS("data/DGE/design_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
v1 <- readRDS("data/DGE/v1_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
fit <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(

  # Species differences
  HvC_Day0  = SpeciesH,
  HvC_Day2  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  HvC_Day5  = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  HvC_Day15 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  HvC_Day30 = SpeciesH + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30,
  
  #Trajectory differences
  H_Day02 = TimepointDay2 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day25 = TimepointDay5 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay5 - TimepointDay2 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  H_Day515 = TimepointDay15 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay5 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  H_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 + SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  C_Day02 = TimepointDay2,
  C_Day25 = TimepointDay5 - TimepointDay2,
  C_Day515 = TimepointDay15 - TimepointDay5,
  C_Day1530 = TimepointDay30 - TimepointDay15,
  
  # True interaction tests trajectory
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay5 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay2,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay15 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay5,
  Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530 = SpeciesH.TimepointDay30 - SpeciesH.TimepointDay15,
  
  levels = design_int
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

plotSA(fit2, main = "H3K27ac Model")

results_summary <- decideTests(fit2,
                               adjust.method = "BH",
                               p.value = 0.05)
summary(results_summary)

# saveRDS(fit2, "data/DGE/fit2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Differential_TopTable_Reproducible2}
fit2 <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

#Create Human TopTable. using listapply, then you can pull specific comp using the $
TopTables_H3K27ac_names <- colnames(fit2$coefficients) 

TopTable_H3K27ac_All <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(TopTables_H3K27ac_names,function(ct) {
    
    tt <- topTable(
      fit2,
      coef = ct,
      number = Inf,
      sort.by = "p"
    )
    
    #add identifiers
    tt$Gene <- rownames(tt)
    tt$Comparisons <- ct
    
    tt
  })
)

ComparisonNames <- unique(TopTable_H3K27ac_All$Comparisons)

saveRDS(TopTable_H3K27ac_All, "data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
saveRDS(ComparisonNames, "data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

head(TopTable_H3K27ac_All)
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Differential_TopTable_VolcancoPlots_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

# Calculate global axis limits
x_limits <- range(TopTable$logFC, na.rm = TRUE)
y_limits <- range(-log10(TopTable$P.Value), na.rm = TRUE)

plot <- list()

for (n in ComparisonNames) {
  data_n <- TopTable %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Comparisons == n)
  
  plot[[n]] <- generate_volcano_plot(data_n, n) +
    ggplot2::xlim(x_limits) +
    ggplot2::ylim(y_limits)
}

# Print plots
for (n in ComparisonNames) {
  print(plot[[n]])
}
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Differential_TopTable_Subsetting0.05_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- map(
  ComparisonNames,
  ~ {
    df <- TopTable %>%
      filter(Comparisons == paste0(.x))

    list(
      DEGs = df %>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05),
      NonDEGs = df %>% filter(adj.P.Val >= 0.05)
    )
  }
)


names(H3K27ac_sets) <- paste0(ComparisonNames)

# saveRDS(H3K27ac_sets, "data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
```

#####Species

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Species_FC_Reproducible2, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}

TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Species <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15","HvC_Day30"
  ))

SpeciesD0_genes <- unique(c(H3K27ac_sets$HvC_Day0$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD2_genes <- unique(c(H3K27ac_sets$HvC_Day2$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD5_genes <- unique(c(H3K27ac_sets$HvC_Day5$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD15_genes <- unique(c(H3K27ac_sets$HvC_Day15$DEGs$Gene))
SpeciesD30_genes <- unique(c(H3K27ac_sets$HvC_Day30$DEGs$Gene))

cluster_lists <- list(
 HvC_Day0  = SpeciesD0_genes,
  HvC_Day2  = SpeciesD2_genes,
  HvC_Day5  = SpeciesD5_genes,
  HvC_Day15  = SpeciesD15_genes,
 HvC_Day30  = SpeciesD30_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_species(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Species)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_absfc_sig_species(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Species)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Species_Directionality_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
fit2 <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

Species_DEG_info <- list(
  HvC_Day0 = list(coef = "HvC_Day0", comp = "HvC_Day0"),
  HvC_Day2 = list(coef = "HvC_Day2", comp = "HvC_Day2"),
  HvC_Day5 = list(coef ="HvC_Day5", comp = "HvC_Day5"),
 HvC_Day15 = list(coef = "HvC_Day15", comp = "HvC_Day15"),
 HvC_Day30 = list(coef = "HvC_Day30", comp = "HvC_Day30")
)

direction_results <- setNames(
  lapply(names(Species_DEG_info), function(name) {

    info <- Species_DEG_info[[name]]

    get_fc_directions_HvC(
      traj_label = name,
      coef_name = info$coef,
      comparison_label = info$comp,
      top_table_all = TopTable,
      fit_obj = fit2
    )

  }),
  names(Species_DEG_info)
)

# saveRDS(direction_results, "data/DGE/Species_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Species_Directionality_FC_Reproducible2}

TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
direction_results <-readRDS("data/DGE/Species_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Species <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15",
    "HvC_Day30"
  ))

aa <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$all$Gene)
ab <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$Human_higher$Gene)
ac <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$Chimp_higher$Gene)

ba <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$all$Gene)
bb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$Human_higher$Gene)
bc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$Chimp_higher$Gene)

da <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$all$Gene)
db <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$Human_higher$Gene)
dc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$Chimp_higher$Gene)

ea <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$all$Gene)
eb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$Human_higher$Gene)
ec <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$Chimp_higher$Gene)

fa <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$all$Gene)
fb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$Human_higher$Gene)
fc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$Chimp_higher$Gene)


cluster_lists <- list(
  HvC_Day0_all = aa,
  HvC_Day0_HumanHigher = ab,
  HvC_Day0_ChimpHigher = ac,
  
  HvC_Day2_all = ba,
  HvC_Day2_HumanHigher = bb,
  HvC_Day2_ChimpHigher = bc,
  
  HvC_Day5_all = da,
  HvC_Day5_HumanHigher = db,
  HvC_Day5_ChimpHigher = dc,
  
  HvC_Day15_all = ea,
  HvC_Day15_HumanHigher = eb,
  HvC_Day15_ChimpHigher = ec,
  
  HvC_Day30_all = fa,
  HvC_Day30_HumanHigher = fb,
  HvC_Day30_ChimpHigher = fc
)


cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_species(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Species)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Species_Directionality_absFC_Reproducible2}

TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
direction_results <-readRDS("data/DGE/Species_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Species <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "HvC_Day0","HvC_Day2","HvC_Day5","HvC_Day15",
    "HvC_Day30"
  ))

aa <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$all$Gene)
ab <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$Human_higher$Gene)
ac <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day0$Chimp_higher$Gene)

ba <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$all$Gene)
bb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$Human_higher$Gene)
bc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day2$Chimp_higher$Gene)

da <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$all$Gene)
db <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$Human_higher$Gene)
dc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day5$Chimp_higher$Gene)

ea <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$all$Gene)
eb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$Human_higher$Gene)
ec <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day15$Chimp_higher$Gene)

fa <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$all$Gene)
fb <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$Human_higher$Gene)
fc <- unique(direction_results$HvC_Day30$Chimp_higher$Gene)


cluster_lists <- list(
  HvC_Day0_all = aa,
  HvC_Day0_HumanHigher = ab,
  HvC_Day0_ChimpHigher = ac,
  
  HvC_Day2_all = ba,
  HvC_Day2_HumanHigher = bb,
  HvC_Day2_ChimpHigher = bc,
  
  HvC_Day5_all = da,
  HvC_Day5_HumanHigher = db,
  HvC_Day5_ChimpHigher = dc,
  
  HvC_Day15_all = ea,
  HvC_Day15_HumanHigher = eb,
  HvC_Day15_ChimpHigher = ec,
  
  HvC_Day30_all = fa,
  HvC_Day30_HumanHigher = fb,
  HvC_Day30_ChimpHigher = fc
)


cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_absfc_sig_species(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Species)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```


```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Species_DEGs_Reproducible2}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

hvcdays <- names(H3K27ac_sets)[str_detect(names(H3K27ac_sets), "^HvC_")]

prop_df <- map_dfr(hvcdays, function(traj) {
  
  x <- H3K27ac_sets[[traj]]
  
  tibble(
    trajectory = traj,
    DEG = length(x$DEGs$Gene),
    NonDEG = length(x$NonDEGs$Gene)
  )
})
library(tidyr)

prop_long <- prop_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(DEG, NonDEG),
               names_to = "type",
               values_to = "count") %>%
  group_by(trajectory) %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()
prop_long$trajectory <- factor(
  prop_long$trajectory,
  levels = c("HvC_Day0", "HvC_Day2", "HvC_Day5", "HvC_Day15", "HvC_Day30"),
  labels = c("0", "2", "5", "15", "30")
)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(prop_long, aes(x = trajectory, y = prop, fill = type)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Time",
    y = "Proportion of genes",
    fill = "",
    title = "HvC comparisons: DEG vs NonDEG composition"
  )
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Species_DEGs_Reproducible2_OverlappingVenn, fig.height=7,fig.width=7}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

timepoints <- c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30")

df <- TopTable %>%
  filter(str_detect(Comparisons, "^HvC_Day")) %>%
  mutate(
    Time = str_extract(Comparisons, "Day[0-9]+"),
    DEG = adj.P.Val < 0.05
  ) %>%
  filter(DEG)

genes_list <- list(
  Day0  = df %>% filter(Time == "Day0")  %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique(),
  Day2  = df %>% filter(Time == "Day2")  %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique(),
  Day5  = df %>% filter(Time == "Day5")  %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique(),
  Day15 = df %>% filter(Time == "Day15") %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique(),
  Day30 = df %>% filter(Time == "Day30") %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique()
)

ggVennDiagram(genes_list, label = "count") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue") +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Species_DEGs_Composition_Reproducible2}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

df <- TopTable %>%
  filter(str_detect(Comparisons, "^HvC_Day")) %>%
  mutate(
    Stage = str_extract(Comparisons, "Day[0-9]+"),
    DEG = adj.P.Val < 0.05
  ) %>%
  filter(DEG)

genes <- list(
  Day0  = df %>% filter(Stage == "Day0")  %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique(),
  Day2  = df %>% filter(Stage == "Day2")  %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique(),
  Day5  = df %>% filter(Stage == "Day5")  %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique(),
  Day15 = df %>% filter(Stage == "Day15") %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique(),
  Day30 = df %>% filter(Stage == "Day30") %>% pull(Gene) %>% unique()
)

days <- names(genes)

shared_all <- Reduce(intersect, genes)

get_fate <- function(day) {

  g <- genes[[day]]

  specific <- setdiff(g, unlist(genes[names(genes) != day]))

  shared_all_day <- intersect(g, shared_all)

  shared_partial <- setdiff(
    setdiff(g, specific),
    shared_all_day
  )

  data.frame(
    Day = day,
    Specific = length(specific),
    Shared_partial = length(shared_partial),
    Shared_all = length(shared_all_day)
  )
}

plot_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(genes), get_fate))

library(tidyr)

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Specific, Shared_partial, Shared_all),
    names_to = "Category",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

plot_long$Day <- factor(
  plot_long$Day,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = Day, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Specific" = "#D55E00",
    "Shared_partial" = "#0072B2",
    "Shared_all" = "#009E73"
  )) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Developmental stage",
    y = "Number of DEGs",
    fill = "",
    title = "Fate of HvC DEGs across development"
  )

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

plot_long_prop <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Specific, Shared_partial, Shared_all),
    names_to = "Category",
    values_to = "Count"
  ) %>%
  group_by(Day) %>%
  mutate(
    Prop = Count / sum(Count)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

plot_long_prop$Day <- factor(
  plot_long_prop$Day,
  levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30")
)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(plot_long_prop, aes(x = Day, y = Prop, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col() +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Specific" = "#D55E00",
    "Shared_partial" = "#0072B2",
    "Shared_all" = "#009E73"
  )) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Developmental stage",
    y = "Proportion of DEGs",
    fill = "",
    title = "Fate of HvC DEGs across development (normalized)"
  )


```


#####Trajectory

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Trajectory_FC_Reproducible2, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}

TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
direction_results <-readRDS("data/DGE/Species_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Traj <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

Traj02_genes <- intersect(H3K27ac_sets$H_Day02$DEGs$Gene,H3K27ac_sets$C_Day02$DEGs$Gene)
Traj25_genes <- intersect(H3K27ac_sets$H_Day25$DEGs$Gene,H3K27ac_sets$C_Day25$DEGs$Gene)
Traj515_genes <- intersect(H3K27ac_sets$H_Day515$DEGs$Gene,H3K27ac_sets$C_Day515$DEGs$Gene)
Traj1530_genes <- intersect(H3K27ac_sets$H_Day1530$DEGs$Gene,H3K27ac_sets$C_Day1530$DEGs$Gene)

length(Traj02_genes)
length(Traj25_genes)
length(Traj515_genes)
length(Traj1530_genes)

cluster_lists <- list(
 Traj02_genes  = Traj02_genes,
  Traj25_genes  = Traj25_genes,
  Traj515_genes  = Traj515_genes,
  Traj1530_genes  = Traj1530_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory_No4(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Traj)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_absfc_sig_trajectory_No4(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Traj)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)

```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Trajectory_Directionality_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
fit2 <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")


traj_info <- list(
  Traj02_genes = list(coef = "H_Day02", comp = "Day02"),
  Traj25_genes = list(coef = "H_Day25", comp = "Day25"),
  Traj515_genes = list(coef ="H_Day515", comp = "Day515"),
 Traj1530_genes = list(coef = "H_Day1530", comp = "Day1530")
)

direction_results <- setNames(
  lapply(names(traj_info), function(name) {

    info <- traj_info[[name]]

    get_fc_directions(
      traj_label = name,
      coef_name = info$coef,
      comparison_label = info$comp,
      top_table_all = TopTable,
      fit_obj = fit2,
      gene_set = cluster_lists[[name]]
    )

  }),
  names(traj_info)
)

# saveRDS(direction_results, "data/DGE/Trajectory_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Trajectory_Directionality_FC_Reproducible2}

TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
direction_results <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_Traj <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

aa <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$all$Gene)
ab <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
ac <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
ad <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
ae <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
af <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$Same_direction$Gene)
ag <- unique(direction_results$Traj02_genes$Opposite_direction$Gene)

ba <- unique(direction_results$Traj25_genes$all$Gene)
bb <- unique(direction_results$Traj25_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
bc <- unique(direction_results$Traj25_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
bd <- unique(direction_results$Traj25_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
be <- unique(direction_results$Traj25_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
bf <- unique(direction_results$Traj25_genes$Same_direction$Gene)
bg <- unique(direction_results$Traj25_genes$Opposite_direction$Gene)

da <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$all$Gene)
db <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
dc <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
dd <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
de <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
df <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$Same_direction$Gene)
dg <- unique(direction_results$Traj515_genes$Opposite_direction$Gene)

ea <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$all$Gene)
eb <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
ec <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
ed <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$Both_pos$Gene)
ee <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$Both_neg$Gene)
ef <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$Same_direction$Gene)
eg <- unique(direction_results$Traj1530_genes$Opposite_direction$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Traj02_All = aa,
  Traj02_HumanPos = ab,
  Traj02_ChimpPos = ac,
  Traj02_Both_pos = ad,
  Traj02_Both_neg = ae,
  Traj02_Same_direction = af,
  Traj02_Opposite_direction = ag,
  
  Traj25_All = ba,
  Traj25_HumanPos = bb,
  Traj25_ChimpPos = bc,
  Traj25_Both_pos = bd,
  Traj25_Both_neg = be,
  Traj25_Same_direction = bf,
  Traj25_Opposite_direction = bg,
 
 
  Traj515_All = da,
  Traj515_HumanPos = db,
  Traj515_ChimpPos = dc,
  Traj515_Both_pos = dd,
  Traj515_Both_neg = de,
  Traj515_Same_direction = df,
  Traj515_Opposite_direction = dg,
 
  Traj1530_All = ea,
  Traj1530_HumanPos = eb,
  Traj1530_ChimpPos = ec,
  Traj1530_Both_pos = ed,
  Traj1530_Both_neg = ee,
  Traj1530_Same_direction = ef,
  Traj1530_Opposite_direction = eg
)


cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory_No4(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_Traj)
})

names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```


```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_2_0_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

H_comp <- "H_Day02"
C_comp <- "C_Day02"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
x_limits <- c(-7, 7)
y_limits <- c(-7, 7)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$H_Day02$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$C_Day02$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_4_2_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

H_comp <- "H_Day25"
C_comp <- "C_Day25"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
x_limits <- c(-7, 7)
y_limits <- c(-7, 7)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$H_Day25$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$C_Day25$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```



```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_15_5_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")


H_comp <- "H_Day515"
C_comp <- "C_Day515"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-7, 7)
y_limits <- c(-7, 7)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$H_Day515$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$C_Day515$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Clusters_FC_Quadrants_30_15_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

H_comp <- "H_Day1530"
C_comp <- "C_Day1530"

df_wide <- TopTable %>%
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(H_comp, C_comp)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Comparisons) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparisons, values_from = logFC) %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[H_comp]]), !is.na(.data[[C_comp]]))

# head(df_wide)
# nrow(df_wide)

fit <- lm(df_wide[[C_comp]] ~ df_wide[[H_comp]])
summary(fit)

r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
pval <- summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# r2
# pval

format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)

library(ggplot2)

x_pos <- max(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.95      # right side
x_neg <- min(df_wide[[H_comp]]) * 0.5      # left side

y_pos <- max(df_wide[[C_comp]]) * 0.95

# Optional: make axes symmetric around 0 for a nicer visual
max_val <- max(abs(c(x_limits, y_limits)))
x_limits <- c(-7, 7)
y_limits <- c(-7, 7)


genes_of_interest_human <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$H_Day1530$DEGs$Gene)
genes_of_interest_chimp <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$C_Day1530$DEGs$Gene)

df_wide$highlight <- dplyr::case_when(
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human &
  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Both",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_human ~ "T-DEG Human Only",

  df_wide$Gene %in% genes_of_interest_chimp ~ "T-DEG Chimp Only",

  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

# Plot
ggplot(df_wide, aes(x = .data[[H_comp]], y = .data[[C_comp]], color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("T-DEG Human Only" = "red", "T-DEG Chimp Only" = "blue", "T-DEG Both" = "purple", "Other" = "grey70")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_wide[[H_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_wide[[C_comp]], na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "R² = ", round(r2, 3),
      "\np = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits, ylim = y_limits) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = H_comp,
    y = C_comp,
    title = paste0(H_comp, " vs ", C_comp),
    color = "Gene Set"
  )

```

```{r Trajectory_plotting_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

df_all <- TopTable %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, Comparisons, logFC) %>%
  
  mutate(
    species = ifelse(str_starts(Comparisons, "H_"), "H", "C"),
    trajectory = str_remove(Comparisons, "^[HC]_")
  ) %>%
  
  group_by(Gene, species, trajectory) %>%
  summarize(logFC = mean(logFC), .groups = "drop") %>%
  
  pivot_wider(names_from = species, values_from = logFC) %>%
  
  filter(!is.na(H), !is.na(C))

library(ggplot2)

df_all$trajectory <- df_all$trajectory <- factor(
  df_all$trajectory,
  levels = c("Day02", "Day25", "Day515","Day1530")
)

ggplot(df_all, aes(x = H, y = C, color = trajectory)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # one regression line per trajectory (same color as points)
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, fullrange = TRUE)+
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Human logFC",
    y = "Chimp logFC",
    color = "Trajectory",
    title = "All Trajectories Combined"
  )

df_stats <- df_all %>%
  group_by(trajectory) %>%
  do({
    fit <- lm(C ~ H, data = .)
    data.frame(
      r2 = summary(fit)$r.squared,
      p = summary(fit)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]
    )
  })
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_TrajectoryDEGs_Composition_Reproducible2}
dge <- readRDS("data/DGE/dge_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
design_int <- readRDS("data/DGE/design_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
v1 <- readRDS("data/DGE/v1_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
fit <-readRDS("data/DGE/fit_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
fit2 <-readRDS("data/DGE/fit2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
direction_results <- readRDS("data/DGE/Trajectory_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
  
traj_levels <- c("H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
                 "C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530")

df <- TopTable %>%
  dplyr::filter(Comparisons %in% traj_levels)

df <- df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species = ifelse(grepl("^H", Comparisons), "Human", "Chimp"),
    Stage = sub(".*_(Day[0-9]+)", "\\1", Comparisons),
    DEG = adj.P.Val < 0.05
  )

df_deg <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(DEG)

library(dplyr)

df_deg2 <- df_deg %>%
  group_by(Gene, Stage, Species) %>%
  summarise(.groups = "drop")

df_overlap <- df_deg2 %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Species,
    values_from = Gene,
    values_fn = length,
    values_fill = 0
  )

df_flags <- df_deg2 %>%
  mutate(flag = TRUE) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Species,
    values_from = flag,
    values_fill = FALSE
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    category = case_when(
      Human & Chimp ~ "Shared",
      Human ~ "Human only",
      Chimp ~ "Chimp only"
    )
  )

plot_df <- df_flags %>%
  group_by(Stage, category) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Stage) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))

plot_df$Stage <- factor(
  plot_df$Stage,
  levels = c("Day02", "Day25", "Day515", "Day1530")
)

library(ggpattern)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Stage, y = n, fill = category)) +

  geom_col_pattern(
    aes(pattern = category),
    colour = "black",
    pattern_colour = "black",
    pattern_fill = "white",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Shared" = "grey70",
    "Human only" = "black",
    "Chimp only" = "white"
  )) +

  scale_pattern_manual(values = c(
    "Shared" = "stripe",
    "Human only" = "none",
    "Chimp only" = "none"
  )) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Developmental Stage",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "",
    pattern = ""
  )

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Stage, y = prop, fill = category)) +

  geom_col_pattern(
    aes(pattern = category),
    colour = "black",
    pattern_colour = "black",
    pattern_fill = "white",
    pattern_density = 0.4,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Shared" = "grey70",
    "Human only" = "black",
    "Chimp only" = "white"
  )) +

  scale_pattern_manual(values = c(
    "Shared" = "stripe",
    "Human only" = "none",
    "Chimp only" = "none"
  )) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Developmental Stage",
    y = "Proportion of DERs",
    fill = "",
    pattern = ""
  )
```

#####Interactions

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Interaction_FC_Reproducible2}

TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

TopTable_H3K27ac_Traj <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

Inter_02_genes <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_25_genes <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_515_genes <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515$DEGs$Gene)
Inter_1530_genes <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530$DEGs$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Inter_02_genes  = Inter_02_genes,
  Inter_25_genes  = Inter_25_genes,
  Inter_515_genes  = Inter_515_genes,
  Inter_1530_genes  = Inter_1530_genes
)

cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_trajectory_No4(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_H3K27ac_Traj)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Interaction_Directionality_Reproducible2}
TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_sets__H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
fit2 <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")

traj_info <- list(
  InterTraj02 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj02", comp = "Day02"),
  InterTraj25 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj25", comp = "Day25"),
  InterTraj515 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj515", comp = "Day515"),
  InterTraj1530 = list(coef = "Sig_Sp_inter_Traj1530", comp = "Day1530")
)

cluster_lists <- list(
  InterTraj02  = Inter_02_genes,
  InterTraj25  = Inter_25_genes,
  InterTraj515 = Inter_515_genes,
  InterTraj1530 = Inter_1530_genes
)

direction_results <- setNames(
  lapply(names(traj_info), function(name) {

    info <- traj_info[[name]]

    get_fc_directions(
      traj_label = name,
      coef_name = info$coef,
      comparison_label = info$comp,
      top_table_all = TopTable,
      fit_obj = fit2,
      gene_set = cluster_lists[[name]]
    )

  }),
  names(traj_info)
)

# saveRDS(direction_results, "data/DGE/Interaction_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Interaction_Directionality_FC_Reproducible2, fig.height=7,fig.width=7}

TopTable <- readRDS("data/DGE/TopTable_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
H3K27ac_sets <- readRDS("data/DGE/Interaction_Directions_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
ComparisonNames <- readRDS("data/DGE/ComparisonNames_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
fit2 <- readRDS("data/DGE/fit2_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")


TopTable$absfc <- abs(TopTable$logFC)

TopTable_H3K27ac_Traj <- TopTable %>% 
  filter(Comparisons %in% c(
    "H_Day02","H_Day25","H_Day515","H_Day1530",
    "C_Day02","C_Day25","C_Day515","C_Day1530"
  ))

aa <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj02$all$Gene)
ab <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj02$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
ac <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj02$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
ad <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj02$Both_pos$Gene)
ae <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj02$Both_neg$Gene)
af <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj02$Same_direction$Gene)
ag <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj02$Opposite_direction$Gene)

ba <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj25$all$Gene)
bb <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj25$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
bc <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj25$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
bd <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj25$Both_pos$Gene)
be <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj25$Both_neg$Gene)
bf <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj25$Same_direction$Gene)
bg <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj25$Opposite_direction$Gene)


da <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj515$all$Gene)
db <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj515$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
dc <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj515$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
dd <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj515$Both_pos$Gene)
de <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj515$Both_neg$Gene)
df <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj515$Same_direction$Gene)
dg <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj515$Opposite_direction$Gene)

ea <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj1530$all$Gene)
eb <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj1530$H_pos_C_neg$Gene)
ec <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj1530$H_neg_C_pos$Gene)
ed <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj1530$Both_pos$Gene)
ee <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj1530$Both_neg$Gene)
ef <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj1530$Same_direction$Gene)
eg <- unique(H3K27ac_sets$InterTraj1530$Opposite_direction$Gene)

cluster_lists <- list(
  Inter02_All = aa,
  Inter02_HumanPos = ab,
  Inter02_ChimpPos = ac,
  Inter02_Both_pos = ad,
  Inter02_Both_neg = ae,
  Inter02_Same_direction = af,
  Inter02_Opposite_direction = ag,
  
  Inter25_All = ba,
  Inter25_HumanPos = bb,
  Inter25_ChimpPos = bc,
  Inter25_Both_pos = bd,
  Inter25_Both_neg = be,
  Inter25_Same_direction = bf,
  Inter25_Opposite_direction = bg,

  
  Inter515_All = da,
  Inter515_HumanPos = db,
  Inter515_ChimpPos = dc,
  Inter515_Both_pos = dd,
  Inter515_Both_neg = de,
  Inter515_Same_direction = df,
  Inter515_Opposite_direction = dg,
  
  
  Inter1530_All = ea,
  Inter1530_HumanPos = eb,
  Inter1530_ChimpPos = ec,
  Inter1530_Both_pos = ed,
  Inter1530_Both_neg = ee,
  Inter1530_Same_direction = ef,
  Inter1530_Opposite_direction = eg
  
)


cluster_plots <- lapply(names(cluster_lists), function(clust_name) {
  plot_cluster_fc_sig_interaction_No4(cluster_lists[[clust_name]], clust_name, TopTable_H3K27ac_Traj)
})
names(cluster_plots) <- names(cluster_lists)

for (p in cluster_plots) print(p)


```

####CPM Filtered
#####Stats
```{r H3K27acSeq_DGE_Stats_Reproducible2_FitleringGlobal, fig.height=7,fig.width=7}
library(edgeR)

counts_table <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_Metadata.RDS")

counts <- counts_table %>%
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day0")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40280_Day2")) %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))

metadata <- metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint != "Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "C40280_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day0") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day2") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day5") %>%
  filter(SampleName != "H20682R_Day30")

counts_norep <- counts %>%
  dplyr::select(-(contains("R")))
```
